---
name: '🚀 Feature Request'
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for stellar-starter-kit
title: 'feat: [Short description of feature]'
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: []
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I'm always frustrated when...")

## Describe the Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the proposed API, hook, UI component, or utility.

## Describe Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, wireframes, or code snippets about the feature request here.
